summary: Clear soundboard capture of a scorching 1981 show, highlighted by an especially hot second set.
review: Reviewers praise the recording for its unusually crisp and vivid soundboard quality, noting that most ’81 boards don’t sound this good. The performance is described as “scorching,” with a post‑drums section that exceeds expectations, though the first half of set 1 feels a bit rushed. Overall the show is regarded as a strong, energetic outing.

ai_rating.rationale: Both musical performance and recording quality receive mostly high praise; minor tempo complaint keeps rating just below top tier.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Boards sound clear and crisp, with hot post‑drums energy captured; no significant flaws reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic overall, second set especially fiery; first half of the show feels a bit fast but remains enjoyable.

band_member_comments.Drums: Post‑drums section described as hotter than expected, indicating strong drum work.
